## How I tested

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `ags run .` launched and the change renders as expected
- [ ] If a new widget: added to `widgets/index.ts` and documented in `docs/widgets.md`
- [ ] If a new theme: added to `lib/theme.ts` and documented in `docs/themes.md`
